sources.label: Elgiganten Weekly Deals
sources.notes: Auto-discovers active Elgiganten campaign IDs via Algolia facets, then fetches all products on sale. campaignTypes: W=weekly deals, S=store campaigns, R=recurring, B=brand — default ['W'] for the main weekly sale. minDiscountPct filters out small discounts. beforePrice is the original price; price.amount is the sale price. No external API key required.

sources.label: Elgiganten Outlet
sources.notes: Direct Algolia API (public search key). Filter productTaxonomy.id:PT793 returns all B-grade outlet products. price.amount = outlet price; bItem.aItemPrice = new-item reference price for discount %. ~13 000+ products, no Apify required.

sources.label: Elgiganten outlet (Apify legacy — disabled)
sources.notes: Runs an Apify-backed Elgiganten Sweden outlet search and keeps only URLs under /product/outlet/ before sending Discord alerts.

sources.label: NetOnNet Outlet + Fyndvaror
sources.notes: Scrapes both /art/outlet (~8 pages) and /art/fyndvaror (~18 pages) via RSC HTML parsing. Fixed marker to match both category paths. ~1200 products total. Incremental mode stops pagination after 2 fully-known pages; every 5th scan runs full so stale items get pruned.

sources.label: Webhallen Fyndware (outlet)
sources.notes: Fetches all Fyndvara (outlet) products from Webhallen via their internal productdiscovery/search/fyndware API (~1957 products, 100/page). No Apify required. Includes regularPrice as reference price for discount calculation.

sources.label: Webhallen Deals
sources.notes: Fetches Webhallen Fyndvaror via toplist/64 API (1709 products, sorted by deal score). Complements the fyndware search source.

sources.label: Komplett B-grade
sources.notes: Uses Apify cheerio-scraper to fetch Komplett demovaror category pages on Apify's infrastructure (bypasses Railway IP blocks). Each page embeds 24 products as JSON. Reference prices fetched lazily from product pages and cached.

sources.label: ProShop Outlet
sources.notes: Uses ScraperAPI (render=true, 5 credits/page, free: 5000/mo = ~9 full scans). Falls back to Scrapfly (SCRAPFLY_API_KEY) or self-hosted FlareSolverr (FLARESOLVERR_URL). Incremental mode stops pagination early when pages contain only already-known items — drastically cuts credit usage on repeat scans. scanIntervalMinutes=240 means scheduled scans run this source at most every 4h. Full scan via UI/API always runs immediately.

sources.label: Power Outlet
sources.notes: Direct REST API: /api/v2/productlists?s=5&o=true&cd=false. No Apify needed. Returns outlet/returned products with full price, image, and outletReason. Paginates with from= offset until isLastPage=true. ~10k products total.

sources.label: GG.deals – Game Prices
sources.notes: Auto-discovers top Steam games via SteamSpy (10k IDs, weekly refresh). Processes maxGamesPerScan=500 Steam games per scan via GG.deals API (rotating window). PS5/Xbox: scrapes GG.deals deal pages via FlareSolverr (dealsPageCount=5 pages per platform = ~250 active deals each). GG_DEALS_API_KEY required for Steam. FLARESOLVERR_URL required for PS5/Xbox. Steam rate limits: 100 games/min, 1000/hour — handled automatically with 62s inter-batch delay.

sources.label: Blocket (begagnat elektronik)
sources.notes: Uses Blocket's internal BFF JSON API (no auth required). Searches for electronics keywords and paginates up to maxPagesPerKeyword pages each. ~53 results per page. Good for spotting resale deals on second-hand Swedish electronics.

sources.label: Approved or self-hosted RSS feed
sources.notes: Useful for community deal feeds or approved marketplace exports. If a site blocks direct scraping, prefer feeds or official APIs instead.

sources.label: SweClockers Deals
sources.notes: Community-submitted deals from sweclockers.com/dagensfynd. Each row is a member-posted deal with title, store, price, category, and community upvote score. Requires a Cloudflare bypass backend: FLARESOLVERR_URL (preferred, free self-hosted), SCRAPFLY_API_KEY, or SCRAPERAPI_KEY. No Apify token required. Set enabled=true and deploy FlareSolverr (ghcr.io/flaresolverr/flaresolverr:latest) to use.

sources.label: Inet Fyndhörnan
sources.notes: Scrapes inet.se/fyndhornan (Bargain Corner) via Apify cheerio-scraper. Server-rendered React with embedded hydrate JSON. ~400 outlet/refurb products across 7 pages. Requires APIFY_TOKEN. Uses RESIDENTIAL proxy to avoid Cloudflare challenges.

sources.label: Kjell & Company Outlet
sources.notes: Direct JSON API — kjell.com/se/outlet returns JSON with XHR headers (accept: application/json + x-requested-with). ~3 300 outlet products at 60/page. price.currentInclVat = outlet price, price.originalInclVat = reference price. Outlet grade A/B parsed from ?outlet= URL param. No API key or Cloudflare bypass needed. Incremental mode stops after 2 fully-known pages; every 5th scan runs full.

sources.label: Dustin Fyndvaror
sources.notes: dustinhome.se hard-403s direct requests — requires FLARESOLVERR_URL (or SCRAPERAPI_KEY/SCRAPFLY_API_KEY). Parses embedded searchResultProduct JSON from listing pages; includes manufacturerProductIdentifier for cross-store matching. VERIFY ON THE PI before enabling: run a single-source scan (curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/run -d '{"sourceIds":["dustin-fyndvaror"]}'), check item count and that ?page=2 pagination yields new products. Written against an Aug 2025 Wayback capture.

sources.label: Power Kampanjer
sources.notes: Same Power REST API as Power Outlet but with o=false — regular campaign markdowns instead of outlet/returned items. Only keeps products with previousPrice above current price and discount ≥ minDiscountPct.
